festival_logic: Apatite’s Dawn marks the year start.
Res’tdai is a rest and reflection day.
Wadai aligns ritual feasts with celestial phenomena.
labor_bindings: Market and guild rhythms cluster around week turnover and observance bands.
ritual_bindings: Evening omen and vigilance rites lean toward Felelem.
House Panim oversees major afterlife and divine balance festivals.
travel_bindings: Route traffic peaks around market cadence and festival windows.
Aurora Meadows and moon cycles affect travel attention and celebratory gatherings.
legal_bindings: Festival surges create extra clerk deployment in shared civic halls.
Ceremonial attire rules intensify around noble and ritual observances.
